name: site-eleventy
description: Andrea Buran's site, built with Eleventy.

scripts.build:js: terser src/scripts/js/sticky-header.js src/scripts/js/mode.js src/scripts/js/formations.js src/scripts/js/anchored-headings.js src/scripts/js/emails.js src/scripts/js/slides.js src/scripts/js/video-embeds.js src/scripts/js/footnotes.js src/scripts/js/main.js --compress --mangle --output src/scripts/js/main.min.js
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && eleventy
scripts.start: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && (sass src/styles/scss/main.scss:src/styles/css/main.css src/colors/styles/scss/main.scss:src/colors/styles/css/main.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map --watch & eleventy --serve)

author: Andrea Buran
